title: Getting Started
description: Learn how to create AI-powered marketing copy with CopyZap Copy Maker. Master workflows, AI models, input fields, output structures, and iteration techniques for professional results.

title: Start Hub
description: Your launchpad for creating copy. Choose from Copy Wizard, Copy Form, or Templates to begin your workflow.

title: Quick Prompt Wizard
description: Create copy in under 2 minutes using CopyZap's guided wizard. Perfect for beginners and quick projects.

title: Smart vs Expert Mode
description: Find the mode toggle switch at the top of Copy Maker. Switch between simplified Smart Mode and full-featured Expert Mode.

title: About Copy Maker
description: Learn the philosophy behind Copy Maker. Understand our approach to AI-powered copywriting and how to get the most from the platform.

title: Project Setup
description: Learn how to configure your project settings, AI models, and preferences for optimal copy generation results.

title: Brand Voice System
description: Create, edit, and apply brand voices using manual entry, AI generation, paste copy analysis, URL scanning, or 6 professional presets. Includes advanced style controls (rhythm, persona, formality, POV, vocabulary complexity) and save from output feature.

title: Templates & Reuse
description: Save and reuse your best configurations as templates. Speed up recurring workflows with prefilled settings.

title: Generated Output
description: Understand what you receive after generating copy: primary output, alternatives, SEO metadata, and evaluation scores.

title: Export & File Management
description: Export your copy in multiple formats (PDF, DOCX, Markdown, JSON) and manage your generation history efficiently.

title: Dashboard & History
description: Learn how to use the Dashboard, find saved outputs, manage sessions, and track your generation history.

title: Credits & Billing
description: Understand the credit system, costs per action, billing, and best practices to optimize credit usage.

title: Optional Output Features
description: Learn what each optional output feature does in CopyZap — from SEO Metadata to GEO Optimization, TL;DR, and Keyword Integration.

title: Feature Interactions
description: Understand how Copy Maker features work together and which combinations produce the best results for different use cases.

title: Voice Styles & Blending
description: In Optional Features, toggle on "Apply Voice Style" or "Generate Humanized Copy" to enhance your copy with specific stylistic approaches.

title: Evaluation Tools
description: Learn how to objectively evaluate multiple versions of your copy and blend the best elements into one perfect output.

title: Workflow Builder
description: Create automated multi-step workflows to streamline repetitive tasks and apply consistent transformations.

title: Quick Tutorials
description: Step-by-step guides showing how to master CopyZap features quickly with real examples and best practices.

title: Tutorial: Create your first output
description: Use the Quick Prompt Wizard to generate professional marketing copy in under 2 minutes. Step-by-step walkthrough for new users.

title: Tutorial: Improve copy from a website URL
description: Turn any live web page into optimized, high-converting copy using CopyZap's URL analyzer. 7-step walkthrough.

title: Tutorial: Compare versions & select the best
description: Score multiple copy versions using Conversion, Trust, and Risk metrics. Pick a winner with confidence using CopyZap's evaluation engine.

title: Recommended Settings
description: Discover the best configuration settings for different content types: blog posts, landing pages, ads, emails, and more.

title: Core Workflows
description: TL;DR CopyZap has five core workflows: Create New Copy, Improve Existing Copy, A/B Test Variations, Apply Brand Voice, and Generate Complete Campaigns.

title: Workflows & Examples
description: Real-world workflows showing how professionals use CopyZap for landing pages, blog posts, social media, and client work.

title: Real-Case Workflows
description: Use the wizard to generate fresh copy in under 2 minutes, learn shortcuts, and discover advanced patterns.

title: Best Practices
description: Core Principle Start simple, iterate often, and save what works. Master the art of effective prompting and systematic improvement.

title: Glossary of Terms
description: Quick reference for all Copy Maker terms, features, and concepts. Understand the vocabulary of AI copywriting.

title: Troubleshooting & FAQs
description: Solutions to common issues, error messages, and frequently asked questions about using CopyZap effectively.

title: Contact Support
description: Need help, found a bug, or want to request a new feature? Our support team is here to help.
